case_title: EUGENIO ROCHA VS. EUGENIO MARTINEZ LLAMAS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED MAR-28-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LLAMAS, EUGENIO MARTINEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. FLOAR MARTINEZ ACTS AS SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR THE PLAINTIFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROCHA, EUGENIO AS TO DEFENDANT LLAMAS, EUGENIO MARTINEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROCHA, EUGENIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LLAMAS, EUGENIO MARTINEZ STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2012 - JUDGMENT.
